title: Stage a remote configuration rollout using Fleet Management

blocks.content:
Welcome to the Fleet Management learning path that shows you how to safely roll out configuration pipelines across your collector fleet using a staged deployment strategy.

Rolling out a new pipeline to your entire fleet at once is risky. A misconfigured pipeline can silently drop telemetry or break collectors in production before you can react. Using the `env` attribute with regular expression matching, you can roll out gradually — starting with dev, expanding to staging, then releasing to production in controlled stages. At any point, you can deactivate the pipeline with a single click.

## Here's what to expect

When you complete this path, you'll be able to:

- Verify that your collectors have the `env` attribute set, and add it if needed
- Roll out a configuration pipeline to your development environment first
- Expand the rollout incrementally to staging and production
- Immediately halt a rollout by deactivating a pipeline

## Before you begin

Before you stage a rollout, ensure you have:

- A Grafana Cloud account. To create one, refer to [Grafana Cloud](https://grafana.com/signup/cloud/connect-account).
- Grafana Cloud administrator privileges.
- Collectors already registered with Fleet Management.
- A configuration pipeline ready to roll out.

## Troubleshooting

If you get stuck, we've got your back! Where appropriate, troubleshooting information is just a click away.

## More to explore

We understand you might want to explore other capabilities not strictly on this path. We'll provide you opportunities where it makes sense.
